english translation text:
In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the
All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

Peace be with You
O saint of God

Peace be with You
O proof of God

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُوْرَ اللهِ فِىْ ظُلُمَاتِ الْاَرْضِ
english translation text:
Peace be with You
O light of Allah in the darkness of the earth

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَامَنْ يَدُ اللهِفِىْ شَانِهِ
english translation text:
Peace be with You
O one whose status was affirmed by Allah

arabic text: اَتَيْتُكَ زَائِراً عَارِفًا بِحَقِّكَ مُعَاَدِيًا لِاَعْدَائِكَ مُوَالِيًا
english translation text: I have come to You as a visitor, knowing Your right, expressing enmity to Your enemies and as a befriender of Your adherents.

arabic text: لِاَوْلِيَائِكَ فَاشْفَعْ لِىْ عِنْدَرِبِّكَيَا مَولاَىَ
english translation text:
Therefore O my Master, intercede for me in
front of Your Lord

May the Mercy and Blessings of God be
with You
